registry_name: Gate 7A-0 First-Class Broker Model Feature Flag Registry
description: Canonical feature flag registry for Gate 7A-0 implementation. All flags default to false (fail-closed). No flags are enabled during Gate 7A-0.
fail_closed_guarantee: All disabled flags return 403 Forbidden or fail-closed response when accessed. UI routes are hidden. Backend protected actions are blocked.

FIRST_CLASS_BROKER_MODEL_ENABLED.description: Master enable flag for first-class broker agency model. Required parent for broker signup, workspace, MGA relationships, and quote channel features.
FIRST_CLASS_BROKER_MODEL_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: All broker agency model features are hidden and blocked when disabled.
FIRST_CLASS_BROKER_MODEL_ENABLED.backend_impact: All broker model endpoints return 403 Forbidden

DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_CONTEXT_ENABLED.description: Enable distribution channel context model and scope resolution. Required parent for workspace, MGA relationships, and benefits admin bridge.
DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_CONTEXT_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Channel context features hidden and blocked when disabled.
DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_CONTEXT_ENABLED.backend_impact: Channel context scope resolution returns 403 Forbidden

BROKER_PLATFORM_RELATIONSHIP_ENABLED.description: Enable broker-platform relationship model. Required parent for broker signup.
BROKER_PLATFORM_RELATIONSHIP_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Broker-platform relationship features hidden and blocked when disabled.

BROKER_MGA_RELATIONSHIP_ENABLED.description: Enable broker-MGA relationship model and affiliations. Requires FIRST_CLASS_BROKER_MODEL_ENABLED and DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_CONTEXT_ENABLED.
BROKER_MGA_RELATIONSHIP_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Broker-MGA relationship features hidden and blocked when disabled.

BROKER_SCOPE_ACCESS_GRANT_ENABLED.description: Enable cross-broker and broker-MGA scope access grants. Deferred to Phase 7A-0.5.
BROKER_SCOPE_ACCESS_GRANT_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Scope access grant features hidden and blocked when disabled.
BROKER_SCOPE_ACCESS_GRANT_ENABLED.ui_impact: No scope access grant UI visible

BROKER_SIGNUP_ENABLED.description: Enable broker agency self-signup flow. Requires FIRST_CLASS_BROKER_MODEL_ENABLED and BROKER_PLATFORM_RELATIONSHIP_ENABLED.
BROKER_SIGNUP_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Broker signup route hidden, signup endpoint returns 403 Forbidden.

BROKER_ONBOARDING_ENABLED.description: Enable broker agency onboarding workflow. Requires BROKER_SIGNUP_ENABLED.
BROKER_ONBOARDING_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Broker onboarding workflow hidden and blocked when disabled.

BROKER_WORKSPACE_ENABLED.description: Enable broker agency workspace and dashboard. Requires FIRST_CLASS_BROKER_MODEL_ENABLED and DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_CONTEXT_ENABLED.
BROKER_WORKSPACE_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Broker workspace UI hidden, endpoints return 403 Forbidden.

QUOTE_CHANNEL_WRAPPER_ENABLED.description: Enable quote channel wrapper for broker/channel-aware quoting. Requires FIRST_CLASS_BROKER_MODEL_ENABLED and DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_CONTEXT_ENABLED.
QUOTE_CHANNEL_WRAPPER_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Quote channel wrapper behavior hidden, quote engine operates as standalone.
QUOTE_CHANNEL_WRAPPER_ENABLED.backend_impact: Quote channel wrapper endpoints return 403 Forbidden

QUOTE_DELEGATION_ENABLED.description: Enable quote delegation to brokers/partners. Requires QUOTE_CHANNEL_WRAPPER_ENABLED.
QUOTE_DELEGATION_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Quote delegation features hidden and blocked when disabled.

BENEFITS_ADMIN_CHANNEL_BRIDGE_ENABLED.description: Enable benefits admin channel bridge for employer-direct enrollment. Requires QUOTE_CHANNEL_WRAPPER_ENABLED and DISTRIBUTION_CHANNEL_CONTEXT_ENABLED.
BENEFITS_ADMIN_CHANNEL_BRIDGE_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Benefits admin channel bridge hidden and blocked when disabled.
BENEFITS_ADMIN_CHANNEL_BRIDGE_ENABLED.ui_impact: Benefits admin bridge UI not visible
BENEFITS_ADMIN_CHANNEL_BRIDGE_ENABLED.backend_impact: Benefits admin bridge endpoints return 403 Forbidden

BENEFITS_ADMIN_CASE_SHELL_ENABLED.description: Enable benefits admin case shell for case management. Permanently disabled during Gate 7A-0. No dependencies (remains inactive).
BENEFITS_ADMIN_CASE_SHELL_ENABLED.fail_closed_behavior: Benefits admin case shell features permanently hidden and blocked.
BENEFITS_ADMIN_CASE_SHELL_ENABLED.ui_impact: Benefits admin case shell UI not visible
BENEFITS_ADMIN_CASE_SHELL_ENABLED.backend_impact: Benefits admin case shell endpoints return 403 Forbidden

BROKER_SIGNUP_ENABLED.rule: Cannot enable broker signup unless both core model and platform relationship flags are true

BROKER_ONBOARDING_ENABLED.rule: Cannot enable onboarding unless signup is enabled

BROKER_WORKSPACE_ENABLED.rule: Cannot enable workspace unless core model and channel context are true

BROKER_MGA_RELATIONSHIP_ENABLED.rule: Cannot enable MGA relationships unless core model and channel context are true

QUOTE_CHANNEL_WRAPPER_ENABLED.rule: Cannot enable quote channel wrapper unless core model and channel context are true

QUOTE_DELEGATION_ENABLED.rule: Cannot enable delegation unless quote channel wrapper is true

BENEFITS_ADMIN_CHANNEL_BRIDGE_ENABLED.rule: Cannot enable benefits admin bridge unless quote wrapper and channel context are true

BENEFITS_ADMIN_CASE_SHELL_ENABLED.rule: Permanently disabled during Gate 7A-0; no dependencies

validation_rules.fail_closed_guarantee: All disabled flags return 403 Forbidden or fail-closed response
validation_rules.no_ui_activation: No UI route becomes visible when flags are disabled
validation_rules.no_backend_activation: No backend protected action becomes active when flags are disabled
validation_rules.dependency_enforcement: Child flags cannot be true unless parent flags are true
